pokemon:sentret.name: Sentret
pokemon:sentret.summary: When Sentret sleeps, it does so while another stands guard. The sentry wakes the others at the first sign of danger. When this Pokémon becomes separated from its pack, it becomes incapable of sleep due to fear.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When Sentret sleeps, it does so while another stands guard. The sentry wakes the others at the first sign of danger. When this Pokémon becomes separated from its pack, it becomes incapable of sleep due to fear.
It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.
It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.
When acting as a lookout, it warns others of danger by screeching and hitting the ground with its tail.
It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.
They take turns standing guard when it is time to sleep. The sentry awakens the others if it senses danger. If one becomes separated, it turns sleepless with fear.
It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.
A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
A very cautious Pokémon, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.
A very cautious POKéMON, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.

When Sentret sleeps, it does so while another stands guard. The sentry wakes the others at the first sign of danger. When this Pokémon becomes separated from its pack, it becomes incapable of sleep due to fear.
It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.
It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.

When SENTRET sleeps, it does so while another stands guard. The sentry wakes the others at the first sign of danger. When this POKéMON becomes separated from its pack, it becomes incapable of sleep due to fear.

It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.

It has a very nervous nature. It stands up high on its tail so it can scan wide areas.

pokemon:furret.name: Furret
pokemon:furret.summary: Furret has a very slim build. When under attack, it can slickly squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, this Pokémon is very nimble and fleet.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Furret has a very slim build. When under attack, it can slickly squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, this Pokémon is very nimble and fleet.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
It lives in narrow burrows that fit its slim body. The deeper the nests go, the more maze­ like they become.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
A FURRET has a very slim build. When under attack, it can squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, it is very nimble and fleet.
There is no telling where its tail begins. Despite its short legs, it is quick at hunting RATTATA.
It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.
It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other Pokémon to enter.
It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other POKéMON to enter.
Furret has a very slim build. When under attack, it can slickly squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, this Pokémon is very nimble and fleet.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
FURRET has a very slim build. When under attack, it can slickly squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, this POKéMON is very nimble and fleet.
FURRET has a very slim build. When under attack, it can slickly squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, this POKéMON is very nimble and fleet.
There is no tell­ ing where the tail begins. Despite its short legs, it is quick at hunt­ ing RATTATA.
There is no telling where the tail begins. Despite its short legs, it is quick and likes to chase RATTATA.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
The mother puts its offspring to sleep by curling up around them. It corners foes with speed.
It makes a nest to suit its long and skinny body. The nest is impossible for other Pokémon to enter.
